subcodes.first_line: O son of My Afnán! Thou art the one who soared in My atmosphere, came before My Countenance, drank the choice wine of My utterance
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابن افنانی الذی طار فی هوائی و حضر امام وجهی و شرب رحیق بیانی و اتخذ لنفسه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
